description: Small fragment, probably from a literary text (astronomical?) in Judaeo-Arabic. The Lieberman catalog (cited in FGP) connects this shelfmark with ENA 3571.2, but the two shelfmarks are not related. There was also a previous PGP description that said that verso includes a qedusha for Purim, but that must also be referring to a different shelfmark.
description_he: טקסט ספרותי ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
